abilities.name: Teleport
abilities.description: For most buildings, the channel time increases linearly. Cooldown: 80/40/40. Mana Cost: 75. Cast Range: Global. Teleport Check Radius: 1150. Teleport Check Timer: 25. Min Target Distance: 70.

abilities.name: Properties
abilities.description: All heroes start the game with an unsellable Town Portal Scroll. Initial Cooldown: 100.

abilities.name: Boots of Travel
abilities.description: Automatically and passively refunds all Town Portal Scrolls at full cost in the dedicated slot. Town Portal Scroll Cooldown: 40/40.
